component.name: LPA
component.summary: A minimalist Pomodoro timer with Lo-Fi streams and ambient soundscapes

description.p: An app I built in the desperate attempt to get me a 12 LPA job (pun intended, Indians know what i'm on about).
Set pomodoro timers, stream your favourite lo-fi tracks and set some ambient noise in the background and chill...

ul.li: Customisable Pomodoro phases (Work, Short Break, Long Break).
Integrated Lo-Fi radio streaming via YouTube and internet radio.
Ambient sound mixer to create your ideal soundscape.
System tray support for quick access.
Unified interface for Lo-Fi, Pomo, and Ambient Sounds.
Multi-channel audio support for simultaneous lo-fi and ambience.
